name: SCAR-20 | 蓝洞
descriptionEn: The SCAR-20 is a semi-automatic sniper rifle that trades a high rate of fire and powerful long-distance damage for sluggish movement speed and big price tag. It has been sponged and brush-painted with blue metallic effect paints. The founder of Season Corporation had this piece commissioned after being rescued by renowned Operator Kotaro Izaki
descriptionZh: SCAR-20 是一把以迟缓的移动速度和高昂的价格为代价，换取高射速及强大的远距离杀伤力的半自动狙击步枪。 这把武器使用蓝色金属涂料进行了点画和涂装。 在四季公司的创始人被名闻遐迩的特种兵伊崎小太郎营救后，下单订制了这把武器
